name: No-Bake Lemon Cheesecake
recipeIngredient: 1 cup cornflakes or graham cracker crumbs
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix together the cornflakes (or graham cracker crumbs), sugar, and cinnamon in a bowl.
2. Add the melted margarine to the dry ingredients and blend until well combined. Set aside.
3. Line the bottom of a 9-inch pan with the prepared mixture of crumbs.
4. Refrigerate until ready to use.
5. Beat the cream cheese until fluffy, then gradually add the sweetened condensed milk, lemon juice, and vanilla.
6. Pour the batter into the chilled crust.
7. Sprinkle any remaining crumb mixture over the top.
8. Refrigerate for at least 3 hours before serving. The recipe can be doubled and baked in a 9x13-inch pan if desired.
